. COMMITTED. RESEARCH ORIENTED. CENTRE FOR RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT Centre for Research and Development plays a pivotal role as a catalyst for academic advancement and societal progress. By fostering a vibrant research culture, it encourages interdisciplinary collaboration, generates new knowledge, and addresses pressing societal challenges. By promoting innovation, it not only enriches the quality of education but also drives economic growth by facilitating the translation of research outcomes into practical applications. Leveraging partnerships with industry, government agencies and other academic institutions, the center maximizes its impact, contributing significantly to the advancement of knowledge and the socio-economic development of communities

. RESEARCH INSTITUTE RECOGNITION BY ANNA UNIVERSITY 1 CRORE+ RESEARCH INCENTIVES 4 TOP 2% SCIENTISTS OF THE WORLD @ SRI ESHWAR WORLD CLASS RESEARCH FACILITIES LEADERSHIP Dr. G. Karuppusami Dean – Research & Outreach Know more Dr. H. Anandakumar Associate Dean – Research Know more RESEARCH ADVISORY BOARD The Research Advisory board comprises senior researchers from some of the best institutions in India. They provide guidance for the overall direction of our R&D initiatives and timely inputs to our research activities and initiatives

. They provide guidance for the overall direction of our R&D initiatives and timely inputs to our research activities and initiatives. Dr.P.Santhi Thilagam Professor and Head, Department of Computer Science and Engineering National Institute of Technology Karnataka, Mangalore, Karnataka, India Dr.S.Karunanidhi Director, CSL,RCI-Senior Scientist, DRDO(Hyderabad), India Dr.Anand Nayyar Professor, Scientist, Vice-Chairman (Research), Duy Tan University, Vietnam Dr.M.Santhakumar Dean, Industry collaboration and sponsored research, IIT Palakkad, Kerala, India RESEARCH ETHICS COMMITTEE Sri Eshwar College of Engineering is dedicated to promoting and maintaining high standards of integrity in academic research

. Committed to fostering a culture of honesty and transparency, the institution prioritizes academic freedom and innovative thinking while striving to eliminate all forms of academic fraud, including plagiarism. SECE emphasizes the importance of original thought and expression, ensuring these standards through a rigorous review process. Faculty, staff and students are expected to adhere to the high ethical standards outlined in the Ethics and Values Policy of SECE, reinforcing the college’s commitment to academic honour and integrity. . Sharing of knowledge especially theoretical and practical findings of research through various platforms enhances the quality of research. Researchers at Sri Eshwar possess great research acumen, leading to publications in SCI, WoS, Scopus, Indexed Journals and Filing of patents. Research Publications & Book Chapters Intellectual Property Rights (ipr) AU approved research institute SPONSORED RESEARCH Sri Eshwar encourages members of faculty to seek support and secure research funds from industry and various funding agencies such as DST, AICTE, TNSCST, MHRD, CSIR, DRDO, ISTE, Industry etc to develop research facility and to carry out research projects. The Institute also supports by sponsoring seed fund to the departments to set up research laboratories and promote research

. The Institute also supports by sponsoring seed fund to the departments to set up research laboratories and promote research. Research Grants seed fund consultancy funding ADVANCED RESEARCH CENTRES Sri Eshwar Advanced Research Centre is fully committed to the advancement of research and development across a wide range of disciplines. Our 9 Advance Research Centres promotes multidisciplinary research in engineering and technology. Through the Advanced Research Centres, funded research projects, publication of research articles, commercialization of patents, short term training programs and development programs for faculty and students are conducted

. Our multi-disciplinary approach and collaboration with industry partners, government agencies and academia enable us to address complex challenges and make significant contributions to various fields

. DRDO sponsored Centre for Quantum Computing and Nanotechnology DST Sponsored Centre For Advanced Materials And Testing Centre for Human-Centric AI and Augmented Intelligence Centre for Next-Generation Semiconductor and Microelectronics Technologies Centre for Blockchain, Cybersecurity and Secure Systems Centre for Future Networks and Digital Twin Technologies Centre for Green Technologies and Sustainability Centre for Computational Imaging and Machine Vision Systems Centre for Advanced Signal Processing and Translational Biomedical Engineering RESEARCH FACILITIES Sri Eshwar is committed to investing in high quality research facilities that enhance the quality of research and bring out the best research outcomes

. KNOW MORE INTERNATIONAL CONFERENCES Sri Eshwar is proud to host the following international conferences every year, to bring together globally renowned research professionals to share knowledge and collaborate for high quality research outcomes. These conferences also aim at exhibiting the technical expertise of budding technocrats, research scholars and representatives from academia and industry

. International Conference on Advanced Computing and Communication Systems Series International Conference on Sustainable Materials and Technologies Series International Conference on Intelligent Computing and Smart Communication Systems Series RESEARCH EVENTS We host a vibrant array of research events designed to foster collaboration, knowledge exchange and innovation within our academic community. Our events provide valuable opportunities for networking, learning and sharing insights. KNOW MORE INSTITUTIONAL RESEARCH COMMITTEE Research Committee at Sri Eshwar is established to monitor the research initiatives and activities of the Institute. The committee consists of Deans, HoDs and Department Research Coordinators. To motivate and develop research culture among faculty and students

. The committee consists of Deans, HoDs and Department Research Coordinators. To motivate and develop research culture among faculty and students. To establish a Research Centre in every department. The committee encourages the faculty members to enroll for PhD. programmes in their fields of interest. To motivate the faculty to take up research and consultancy projects. To encourage submission of proposals to the funding agencies for carrying out research projects and conducting national/International Conferences, Seminars, Faculty Development Programmes. To arrange timeline presentation of Research Scholars and provide assistance wherever required. To assist faculty and students in filing patent applications

. To assist faculty and students in filing patent applications. To motivate faculty and students to publish papers in internationally reputed journals and in collaboration with industry experts.
